message:
fix: restore SSE UTF-8 error propagation for invalid byte sequences

Re-add first_error tracking in process_chunk_with_utf8_tail so callers
are informed when invalid UTF-8 bytes are encountered mid-stream, even
though the parser continues past them. This allows upstream error
handlers to log or react to encoding issues rather than silently
swallowing them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
